home.noVehiclesHint1: Start the API in another terminal:

faq.q: What is the minimum number of days to rent?
faq.a: Minimum rental is two days (48 hours) and is reserved with one day rental.

faq.q: What requirements must I meet to rent a vehicle?
faq.a: Age: 21 years old. Valid driver's license. ID or passport (if foreign). Damage deposit according to vehicle. Flight confirmation if visiting as a tourist.

faq.q: Can I pay for the rental with any payment method?
faq.a: Yes. You can pay in cash (USD, DOP or EUR), by card (Visa, Mastercard, Azul) or bank transfer. We accept the main payment methods for your convenience.

faq.q: How long until I get my damage deposit back?
faq.a: The deposit is returned 8 business days after final vehicle return, once possible fines or photo detections (traffic light, speed, etc.) have been verified.

faq.q: Does the price include taxes and other charges?
faq.a: The rate includes the base rental value. Additional charges may apply depending on the length of service and specific conditions (additional insurance, extra driver, etc.).
